title: The article co-authored by our Faculty of Medicine Faculty Member Dr. Merve Erkısa Genel was published in Microvascular Research (Q2 - IF: 3.1) Journal with Web of Science - SCIE index
content:
The article co-authored by our Faculty of Medicine Faculty Member Dr. Merve Erkısa Genel was published in Microvascular Research (Q2 - IF: 3.1) Journal with Web of Science - SCIE index

Pazartesi

Faculty of Medicine Asst. Prof. Merve Erkısa Genel's co-authored article titled "Apoptosis-inducing, anti-angiogenic and anti-migratory effects of a dinuclear Pd(II) complex on breast cancer: A promising novel compound" was published in Microvascular Research (Q2 - IF: 3.1) Journal with Web of Science - SCIE index.

We congratulate her and wish her hcontinued success.
